data.title: Apple negotiating possible investment in Intel raises concerns about its relationship with Washington and Big Tech influence.
data.description: Speculation surrounding a potential investment by Apple has sparked inquiries into the status of the chip giant. With strong connections to the U.S. government, questions arise about the implications of such a move.

data.title: Pending home sales in the US dropped by 1% from a year earlier, marking the first decline in nearly three months. Average mortgage rate is at 6.26%, the lowest in a year, down from roughly 6.9% at the start of summer. Fed's interest-rate cut expected.
data.description: In Seattle, data from Redfin, a real estate brokerage powered by Rocket, revealed a 1% decrease in pending U.S. home sales compared to the same period last year, marking the first decline in almost three months. The average weekly mortgage rate dropped to 6.26%, a significant decrease from the summer's 6.9%, hitting the lowest point in nearly a year. This shift was in anticipation of the Federal Reserve's initial interest rate reduction of the year. The decrease in mortgage rates has been steadily declining.

data.title: Costco Q4 earnings potential - EPS $5.81, revenue $86.06B. Stock dividend $1.30 per share annually.
data.description: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ: COST) is set to announce its Q4 earnings after the market closes on Thursday, September 25th. Analysts predict earnings of $5.81 per share for this quarter, compared to $5.29 per share in the same period last year. COST is expecting revenue of $86.06 billion for the quarter, a significant increase from $79.7 billion a year ago. The company has exceeded revenue expectations in the last two quarters and in five of the past 10 quarters. Investors are monitoring Costco’s performance closely, with an annual dividend yield of 0.55%, equal to a semi-annual dividend of $1.30 per share ($5.20 annually). For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
